name: Carrot and Onion Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and stir until softened, about 3 minutes.
3. Increase the heat to medium-high.
4. Add carrots and stir until just crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in sugar and tarragon. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
